emails.subject: Re: Engage
emails.body: Mary, Per my voice mail to you, I am updating you on the status of the ISDA's we have sent to Engage: 1) Engage Energy US, LP: I spoke to Luke Mickum, the legal person at Engage US (713-877-7446), this morning. He is looking into what issues need to be reviewed/discussed. According to Carol there are no open issues. If that is the case can we send executed copy's of the ISDA to him for signature. Before it is sent off, we need to make sure the correct changes have been made to the Credit Annex, as the credit support provider has changed from my original credit worksheet. I am not sure if Carol had made those changes in her drafts. 2) Engage Energy Canada, LP According to the Lotus Notes Database, the draft amendment of this contract was also sent to Luke, although he is the US lawyer. A draft needs to be sent to the Canadian Lawyer, Suzzi Sethi 403-297-0348. She sent us a draft guaranty for review with the guarantor West Coast Gas Inc. This counterparty is the new guarantor for Engage Canada and the ISDA Credt Annex needs to be updated accordingly. Once again, we need to make sure the Credit information is still correct in the original draft. I have given a copy of the guaranty to Tana, can you please review this and provide your comments to Suzzi. Please let me know if you require any additional information. Thank you, Russell Carol St Clair 08/04/2000 11:58 AM

emails.subject: Engage
emails.body: I am in class until 4:30. I will review the Engage matters following class with Tana. Mary
